title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Original Screenplay
text: According to the No Film School predictions, "Sinners" (Warner Bros.), written by Ryan Coogler, is predicted to win Best Original Screenplay at the 2026 Academy Awards. The other nominees in this category include: "Blue Moon" (Sony Pictures Classics) by Robert Kaplow; "It Was Just an Accident" (Neon) by Jafar Panahi with script collaborators; "Marty Supreme" (A24) by Ronald Bronstein and Josh Safdie; "Sentimental Value" (Neon) by Eskil Vogt and Joachim Trier. The article notes that the Oscars ceremony will take place on March 15, 2026, hosted by Conan O'Brien on ABC and Hulu. The predictions are based on "online chatter and which films are surging" at the time of publication.
